name: vapor-chamber-example-exo-astro
description: exo-style declarative event-bus directives for Astro pages, over the vapor-chamber bus. Run with `npm install && npm run dev`.

scripts.ensure-lib: node -e "const{existsSync}=require('fs');if(!existsSync('../../dist/index.js')){console.log('[example] building vapor-chamber from ../../ ...');require('child_process').execSync('npm --prefix ../.. run build',{stdio:'inherit'})}"
